run_env.reason: 精简版不 import vllm、不触 CUDA（grep 确认仅注释提及 'import vllm'，无实际导入），按 tester 契约可在 host 直接跑纯单元测试。

lint_fidelity.summary: 保真度检查全部通过（# SOURCE 全覆盖 / must_keep 符号保留 / 无杜撰 / 无过度删减）

behavior_alignment.note: 测试断言对齐 dossier 记录的真实 vLLM 行为（data_flow + code_spine），非仅精简版自洽。
checks: 生命周期时序 bind→start_load_kv(forward 前)→yield→wait_for_save(forward 后)→get_finished→clear（mixin L81-L119）— test_lifecycle_order_brackets_forward
无 kv_transfer_group → nullcontext 零开销（mixin L57-L68）— test_maybe_get_output_is_nullcontext_without_group
defer_finalize 推迟 wait_for_save，由 finalize_kv_connector 补做（mixin L70-L79）— test_defer_finalize_skips_wait_for_save_until_finalize
kv_connector_no_forward：无 token 也走收发，wait_for_save=False（mixin L37-L55）— test_no_forward_path_*
逐层 hook：进层 wait_for_layer_load、出层 save_kv_layer（kv_transfer_utils L15-L61）— test_maybe_transfer_kv_layer_*

P2P：producer save → consumer load 数值往返，PUT_ASYNC 后台发 + wait_for_sent fence，parse_request_id 解码对端地址（p2p L111-L331）— test_producer_save_consumer_load_roundtrip / test_get_finished_reports_after_send_and_recv / test_parse_request_id_decodes_peer_address / test_consumer_only_loads_producer_only_saves

NIXL：首遇握手再发 READ、handle 转 DONE 才报收完成、对端 read-done 通知报发完成（不对称），全前缀命中只发通知不读（nixl worker L1840-L1895/L1980-L2109/L1651-L1775）— test_first_contact_handshakes_then_reads / test_get_finished_recving_only_when_handle_done / test_get_finished_sending_from_peer_notif / test_full_prefix_hit_sends_notif_no_read / test_facade_builds_only_worker_half / test_save_and_layer_load_are_noop

Offloading：store 推迟到下一步 start_kv_transfers 才发、load 报 finished_recving、store 完成走 completed_jobs 而非 finished_sending（offloading worker L295-L352）— test_store_is_deferred_to_next_step / test_load_emits_finished_recving / test_store_completion_goes_through_worker_meta_not_finished_sending / test_facade_builds_only_worker_half

subtraction_review: 实现的删除项均落在 dossier subtraction_plan.delete 批准范围内（uniform kv cache、inspect.signature 样板、NIXL 异构 TP/MLA/Mamba/host buffer、P2P GET 模式与 ZMQ 握手、stats/metrics 可观测性、MLA-vs-FlashAttention layout 二选一保留 FlashAttention、facade 非生命周期转发方法）。must_keep 符号全部保留（lint_fidelity 校验通过）。
